title: tesa UK Powerbond Ultra Strong Foam Double Sided Tape, 5 m x 19 mm
features: Heavy duty, double sided foam mounting tape
Secure and fast fixing for permanent hold
Holds up to 10kg per 10cm of tape
For flat objects up to 10mm thick
Suitable for most smooth firm surfaces
description: From the manufacturer tesa Powerbond - for all your mounting needs, around the home or the office. Ensure Optimum Adhesion tesa advises 61 sq cm of tape to be applied per 1 kg of mirror. The tape should be applied vertically. You will achieve optimum results if you work on dry, dust-free and grease-free surfaces and by firmly pressing on the tape. Since tesa has no influence on your individual working conditions or the properties of all different kinds of material, no claim may arise from the statements made in this product information. tesa Powerbond Double-Sided Mounting Tapes The tesa Powerbond range has been designed with individual features for specific applications. Without noise, dust or risk of accidents, objects can be fixed to many different surfaces like mount a mirror in the bathroom or a sign on a door - in just a few simple steps tesa Powerbond double sided tapes are proven quality products which are constantly subjected to strict controls.
